query:
-- Total date-slots requested
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_date_slots FROM request_dates rd
JOIN requests r ON rd.request_id = r.id
WHERE r.status = 'pending';

-- Period A vs B for vacation
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN MONTH(rd.date) BETWEEN 1 AND 6 THEN 'Period A (Jan-Jun)' ELSE 'Period B (Jul-Dec)' END AS period,
  COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) AS requests,
  COUNT(*) AS date_slots
FROM request_dates rd
JOIN requests r ON rd.request_id = r.id
WHERE r.request_type = 'vacation' AND r.status = 'pending'
GROUP BY period;

-- Top 10 most requested dates
SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(rd.date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date,
  e.shift,
  COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) AS request_count
FROM request_dates rd
JOIN requests r ON rd.request_id = r.id
JOIN employees e ON r.employee_id = e.id
WHERE r.request_type = 'vacation' AND r.status = 'pending'
GROUP BY rd.date, e.shift
ORDER BY request_count DESC
LIMIT 10;
